title: Property Consultant - Inorbit Malls - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - Inorbit Malls - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
Inorbit Malls, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Property Consultant for our Pune operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Inorbit Malls:
Inorbit Malls is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in GIS Tools

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Inorbit Malls!
